parsed.production_notes: The video features a person superimposed on a static background image. The person's lighting and edges suggest green-screen compositing.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, light complexion, long dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Black sleeveless top and dark pants.

scenes.setting: Street in front of a Fish & Chips shop, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands on a street. Behind her is a red brick building with a 'FISH & CHIPS' sign. Character A dances energetically, raising her arms.

scenes.visual_description: Character A dances in front of a Fish & Chips shop. Large text overlays the center. The background is a static street scene.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Ähm ...
Ich bin in 137 Stunden auf Englisch zweisprachig geworden!
Ich hab das Gefühl, ich hab mein Gehirn gehackt!
Heute habe ich jedes Wort im neuen Taylor-Swift-Album verstanden?!! (Uhm ... I became bilingual in English in 137 hours! I feel like I hacked my brain! Today I understood every word in the new Taylor Swift album?!!)
